title: EVgo Stock Price Analysis and Earnings Preview: Will It Rebound?
text: EVgo's stock has experienced significant decline, trading at $2.83 after dropping 45% since September and approximately 70% from its 2024 peak. The electric vehicle charging company faces headwinds despite growing EV adoption in the United States, where vehicle counts have surged to over 5 million from 1.3 million in 2021. The company's upcoming earnings report is expected to reveal continued business momentum. Analysts anticipate revenue of $102 million, representing 51% year-over-year growth and an annual revenue projection of $367 million, up 43% annually. Operationally, EVgo demonstrated strength by expanding its charging network to 4,590 stalls and adding 149,000 customer accounts. The organization narrowed net losses to $28 million from $33 million in the prior year's third quarter. A significant concern involves short interest at 25%, suggesting bearish investor sentiment. Technical analysis indicates a falling wedge pattern, with potential resistance at $3.25 and $5.00.
